name: Lawaken Group Inc.
business: Lawaken Group Inc. develops and sells smart eyeglasses and sunglasses that combine vision correction and protection with Bluetooth connectivity for hands-free calls, music, and voice assistant use. The company distributes through its own website (Lawaken.com), JD.com, and a network of independent eyewear retail stores.

exposures.sentence: We develop and sell smart eyeglasses and sunglasses, which are designed to allow our customers to remain connected to their digital lives, while also offering vision correction and protection.
